subject: english
topic_title: Informal Letters and Words Associated with the Environment
learning_objectives: Write an informal letter to a friend
Identify words associated with power production and the environment

sections.heading: Essay Writing: Informal Letters
sections.content: Informal letters are also known as personal or friendly letters. They are written to people we know well like friends and family. Features: One address (writer's), date, informal salutation (Dear John), informal language, and informal closing (Yours sincerely or Best regards followed by first name).

sections.heading: Vocabulary: Words Associated with the Environment
sections.content: Principal sources of power: (a) moving water - current, tides, waterfalls. (b) moving air - wind. (c) fuels - wood, coal, petroleum. (d) nuclear fission - involving changes in atoms. The sun is also a source of energy. Power stations generate electricity using turbines driven by water or steam.
